title: Short PHP open tag used instead of <?php
description: Short open tags (<?) depend on the short_open_tag PHP ini setting which is off by default. Code using short tags will fail silently on many servers.
explanation: The short open tag <? is disabled by default in PHP. Using it makes your module incompatible with standard PHP configurations. Always use <?php.
fix: Replace <? with <?php. Short echo <?= is acceptable in PHP 5.4+.
